executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Phase 2 audit for QR Dine/ScanBite. Test credentials: admin@spicegarden.com / admin123. Base URL http://localhost:3000. Focus on: /dashboard/menu (category CRUD, item CRUD, preview button), /dashboard/tables (QR view/download), customer flow /m/spice-garden with QR token from tables API after login, cart add/checkout/place order. Report broken buttons, 404 links, console errors. Compare mobile customer UI to Swiggy-grade expectations.
